title: lyonia microcarpa
intro: Lyonia microcarpa, also known as the mountain sweet pepperbush or southern foxglove, is a flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia microcarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Lyonia microcarpa is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical applications.
